violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: subtraction-underflow
; LINE: 23
; VIOLATION: Subtraction Underflow at reserveStock
(declare-const available Int)
(declare-const quantity Int)
(declare-const result Int)
(assert (= result (- available quantity)))
(assert (>= available 0))
(assert (>= quantity 0))
(assert (> quantity available))
(assert (< result 0))
(check-sat)
violations.witness:
(
  (define-fun quantity () Int
    1)
  (define-fun result () Int
    (- 1))
  (define-fun available () Int
    0)
)
violations.judge_note: cegar-confirmed: A caller can invoke `reserveStock(productId, 1)` when `db.getAvailable(productId)` returns 0, causing `available - quantity = -1` and setting a negative available stock value with no guard in the code
